briefdescription.para: Performs SD read in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
- Block count passed by the user.
- Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdPs *InstancePtr, u32 Arg, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XSdPs_Write

briefdescription.para: Performs SD write in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
- Block count passed by the user.
- Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: Checks for the transfer complete.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if transfer was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure
XST_DEVICE_BUSY - if the transfer is still in progress

briefdescription.para: Identifies type of card using CMD0 + CMD1 sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Initializes SD.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because a) SD is already initialized b) There is no card inserted c) One of the steps (commands) in the initialization cycle failed

simplesect.para: This function initializes the SD card by following its initialization and identification state diagram. CMD0 is sent to reset card. CMD8 and ACDM41 are sent to identify voltage and high capacity support CMD2 and CMD3 are sent to obtain Card ID and Relative card address respectively. CMD9 is sent to read the card specific data.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes MMC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because a) MMC is already initialized b) There is no card inserted c) One of the steps (commands) in the initialization cycle failed

simplesect.para: This function initializes the SD card by following its initialization and identification state diagram. CMD0 is sent to reset card. CMD1 sent to identify voltage and high capacity support CMD2 and CMD3 are sent to obtain Card ID and Relative card address respectively. CMD9 is sent to read the card specific data.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the card is present or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sends CMD0 to reset the card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sends command to get the card interface details.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sends command to get the card operating condition.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Gets the card ID.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Gets the CSD register from the card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the card voltage to 1.8 V.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Configures the initial Reset.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Configures the initial Host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Checks for Reset Done bits to be cleared after a reset assert.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Bits to be checked to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Sets up the voltage switch.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Check if the CMD and DAT buses are high.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: API to Identify the supported UHS mode.

detaileddescription.para: This API will assign the corresponding tap delay API to the Config_TapDelay pointer based on the supported bus speed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Contains the response for CMD6

briefdescription.para: API to set Tap Delay with respect to the speed modes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Changes the SD Bus Speed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Changes the eMMC bus speed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to do the Auto tuning.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: API to setup ADMA2 descriptor table.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Block count.
Pointer to data buffer.

briefdescription.para: API to setup ADMA2 descriptor table for 64 Bit DMA.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Block count.

briefdescription.para: API to reset the DLL.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Identifies the eMMC speed mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Extended CSD register from the card.

briefdescription.para: Checks the eMMC timing.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Extended CSD register from the card.

briefdescription.para: Sets the clock to the passed frequency.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Selected frequency

briefdescription.para: Checks if the voltage is set to 1.8 V or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if voltage is 1.8V
XST_FAILURE if voltage is not 1.8V

briefdescription.para: Initializes the command sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
- Block count passed by the user.

briefdescription.para: Initiates the Cmd transfer to SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Command to be sent

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure

briefdescription.para: Sets the address of the first write block to be erased.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address of the first write block.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Set start Address is successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because failed to set EndAddr.

briefdescription.para: Sets the address of the last write block to be erased.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address of the last write block.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Set End Address is successful.
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because failed to set EndAddr.

briefdescription.para: Sends Erase command to the device and wait for transfer complete.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if erase operation is successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because erase operation failed.
